---
title: "Applications"
description: "Select an application to open it."
---

::: {.app-launcher}

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
#| warning: false
#| message: false

strip_matching_quotes <- function(value) {
  if (nchar(value) < 2) {
    return(value)
  }

  first_character <- substr(value, 1, 1)
  last_character <- substr(value, nchar(value), nchar(value))

  if (first_character == last_character && first_character %in% c("\"", "'")) {
    return(substr(value, 2, nchar(value) - 1))
  }

  value
}

read_dotenv_apps <- function(path = ".env") {
  if (!file.exists(path)) {
    return(character())
  }

  lines <- trimws(readLines(path, warn = FALSE))
  lines <- lines[nzchar(lines) & !startsWith(lines, "#")]
  lines <- sub("^export\\s+", "", lines)
  matches <- regexec(
    "^([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)\\s*=\\s*(.*)$",
    lines,
    perl = TRUE
  )
  fields <- regmatches(lines, matches)
  fields <- fields[lengths(fields) == 3]

  if (length(fields) == 0) {
    return(character())
  }

  keys <- vapply(fields, `[[`, character(1), 2)
  values <- vapply(fields, `[[`, character(1), 3)
  values <- vapply(values, strip_matching_quotes, character(1))
  stats::setNames(values, keys)
}

read_github_apps <- function() {
  app_json <- Sys.getenv("APP_VARIABLES_JSON", unset = "")

  if (!nzchar(app_json)) {
    return(character())
  }

  if (!requireNamespace("jsonlite", quietly = TRUE)) {
    warning("The jsonlite package is required to read GitHub repository variables.")
    return(character())
  }

  variables <- jsonlite::fromJSON(app_json, simplifyVector = TRUE)

  if (length(variables) == 0) {
    return(character())
  }

  unlist(variables, use.names = TRUE)
}

format_app_name <- function(key) {
  words <- strsplit(key, "[_-]+")[[1]]
  acronyms <- c(
    ai = "AI",
    api = "API",
    yt = "YT"
  )

  formatted_words <- vapply(words, function(word) {
    normalized_word <- tolower(word)

    if (normalized_word %in% names(acronyms)) {
      return(unname(acronyms[[normalized_word]]))
    }

    tools::toTitleCase(normalized_word)
  }, character(1))

  paste(formatted_words, collapse = " ")
}

normalize_app_url <- function(value) {
  value <- trimws(value)

  if (!nzchar(value)) {
    return(NA_character_)
  }

  if (grepl("^https?://", value, ignore.case = TRUE)) {
    return(value)
  }

  if (grepl("^[A-Za-z][A-Za-z0-9+.-]*://", value)) {
    return(NA_character_)
  }

  paste0("http://", value)
}

escape_html <- function(value) {
  value <- gsub("&", "&amp;", value, fixed = TRUE)
  value <- gsub("<", "&lt;", value, fixed = TRUE)
  value <- gsub(">", "&gt;", value, fixed = TRUE)
  value <- gsub("\"", "&quot;", value, fixed = TRUE)
  gsub("'", "&#39;", value, fixed = TRUE)
}

apps <- c(read_github_apps(), read_dotenv_apps())

if (length(apps) > 0) {
  apps <- apps[!duplicated(names(apps), fromLast = TRUE)]
  app_urls <- vapply(apps, normalize_app_url, character(1))
  apps <- app_urls[!is.na(app_urls)]
}

if (length(apps) == 0) {
  cat('<p class="app-empty">No applications are configured yet.</p>')
} else {
  app_names <- vapply(names(apps), format_app_name, character(1))
  app_order <- order(app_names)
  apps <- apps[app_order]
  app_names <- app_names[app_order]

  cat('<ul class="app-grid" aria-label="Available applications">\n')

  for (index in seq_along(apps)) {
    app_name <- escape_html(app_names[[index]])
    app_url <- escape_html(unname(apps[[index]]))
    cat(sprintf(
      '  <li><a class="app-tile" href="%s"><span>%s</span></a></li>\n',
      app_url,
      app_name
    ))
  }

  cat('</ul>\n')
}
```

:::
